image:image.image:title: Sutra Lounge — Premium ambient dining restaurant in Hetauda, Nepal
image:image.image:caption: Interior of Sutra Lounge, the premier restaurant and lounge in Hetauda, Nepal

image:image.image:title: Fresh Pancakes Breakfast — NPR 490 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Fluffy golden-brown pancakes with honey syrup and Himalayan coffee at Sutra Lounge

image:image.image:title: Crispy Chicken Wings — NPR 450 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Chef-seasoned crispy chicken wings glazed in sweet and spicy house reduction

image:image.image:title: Chilly Pork — NPR 550 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Wok-tossed tender pork with chilies, bell peppers, and spring greens

image:image.image:title: Veg-Chilly Momo — NPR 380 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Deep-fried vegetable momo dumplings tossed in garlic chili sauce — authentic Nepali momo in Hetauda

image:image.image:title: Butter Naan and Chicken Curry — NPR 650 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Clay-oven baked butter garlic naan with creamy tomato-cashew chicken curry

image:image.image:title: Aromatic Chicken Biryani — NPR 750 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Classic dum-cooked basmati rice chicken biryani served with yogurt raita

image:image.image:title: Sizzling Chicken Tandoori Platter — NPR 1,150 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Clay-oven roasted tandoori chicken marinated in ginger-garlic and mountain herbs

image:image.image:title: Signature Toast Chicken Sandwich — NPR 550 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Hetauda's favorite — butter-grilled sandwich with chicken, Swiss cheese, and secret lounge dressing

image:image.image:title: Classic Mint Virgin Mojito — NPR 280 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Refreshing fresh mint mojito mocktail with organic lime and brown sugar syrup

image:image.image:title: Specialty Latte Macchiato — NPR 240 | Sutra Lounge Hetauda
image:image.image:caption: Premium Arabica espresso latte macchiato with velvety steamed milk froth
